Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Child of Nakothi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Child of Nakothi screamed like a man being tortured.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Child of Nakothi is a creature with a simple and focused mind characterized by hunger for destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Child of Nakothi's only purpose is to tear every living thing into a jumble of messy parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Child of Nakothi is a horrific mouth that can swallow a man like a net and digest him over days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Children of Nakothi are creatures found in the broken arena.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — The Child of Nakothi is a monstrosity with six hands and a thousand eyes that can whistle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Child of Nakothi is a fused monstrosity that spurts foul-smelling milky blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — A Child of Nakothi attacked Shera in the arena.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — A Child of Nakothi is an ancestral enemy of Loreli.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
